name: Makizou Aramaki
description: Shinigami member of the 11th division.     He is often very timid and cowardly, in contrast to other members of the 11th division, and is unable to understand why Ichigo and his friends would risk their lives for Rukia Kuchiki. He is very annoyed by Yachiru Kusajishi's nickname "Maki-Maki", and is frightened of her.
